SCIM user provisioning and management
Returns a paginated list of SCIM user resources. Supports filtering by user attributes and pagination using startIndex and count parameters per the SCIM 2.0 specification.

query.description: SCIM filter expression (e.g., userName eq "user@example.com"). Supports eq operator on userName.
The 1-based index of the first result to return.
The maximum number of results to return per page.

Provisions a new user in Airtable through the SCIM protocol. The user will be added to the enterprise account. SSO must be configured as Airtable does not allow setting passwords through SCIM.

The Airtable SCIM API supports the System for Cross-domain Identity Management (SCIM 2.0) specification for automated user and group provisioning. It enables identity providers like Okta and Microsoft Entra ID to manage user accounts and group memberships programmatically. SCIM is available for Enterprise License Agreement (ELA) and CLAIM enterprise accounts with SSO configured.
